use_cases: Mobile-first app navigation with animated active state indication
Bottom tab navigation featuring glass-morphism styling and blur effects
Quick-access toolbar with gradient glow effects for visual feedback
Cross-platform navigation component supporting dark and light modes
ai_summary: A futuristic bottom navigation bar featuring glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur and semi-transparent backgrounds. The component includes an animated active indicator that uses Framer Motion's layoutId for smooth morphing transitions between navigation items. Supports dark mode and provides hover glow effects with a blue-to-purple gradient. Designed as a mobile-first navigation pattern that works across desktop and mobile platforms.
